resources.string: "Realign phone for faster charging"
"Realign phone to charge wirelessly"
"The Android TV device will soon turn off; press a button to keep it on."
"The device will soon turn off; press to keep it on."
"No SIM in tablet."
"No SIM in phone."
"PIN codes do not match"
"You have incorrectly attempted to unlock the tablet %1$d times. After %2$d more unsuccessful attempts, this tablet will be reset, which will delete all its data."
"You have incorrectly attempted to unlock the phone %1$d times. After %2$d more unsuccessful attempts, this phone will be reset, which will delete all its data."
"You have incorrectly attempted to unlock the tablet %d times. This tablet will be reset, which will delete all its data."
"You have incorrectly attempted to unlock the phone %d times. This phone will be reset, which will delete all its data."
"You have incorrectly attempted to unlock the tablet %1$d times. After %2$d more unsuccessful attempts, this user will be removed, which will delete all user data."
"You have incorrectly attempted to unlock the phone %1$d times. After %2$d more unsuccessful attempts, this user will be removed, which will delete all user data."
"You have incorrectly attempted to unlock the tablet %d times. This user will be removed, which will delete all user data."
"You have incorrectly attempted to unlock the phone %d times. This user will be removed, which will delete all user data."
"You have incorrectly attempted to unlock the tablet %1$d times. After %2$d more unsuccessful attempts, the work profile will be removed, which will delete all profile data."
"You have incorrectly attempted to unlock the phone %1$d times. After %2$d more unsuccessful attempts, the work profile will be removed, which will delete all profile data."
"You have incorrectly attempted to unlock the tablet %d times. The work profile will be removed, which will delete all profile data."
"You have incorrectly attempted to unlock the phone %d times. The work profile will be removed, which will delete all profile data."
"You have incorrectly drawn your unlock pattern %1$d times. After %2$d more unsuccessful attempts, you will be asked to unlock your tablet using an email account.\n\n Try again in %3$d seconds."
"You have incorrectly drawn your unlock pattern %1$d times. After %2$d more unsuccessful attempts, you will be asked to unlock your phone using an email account.\n\n Try again in %3$d seconds."
"Phone turned off due to heat"
"Device turned off due to heat"
"Tablet turned off due to heat"
"Your phone is now running normally.\nTap for more info"
"Your device is now running normally.\nTap for more info"
"Your tablet is now running normally.\nTap for more info"

"Your phone was too hot, so it turned off to cool down. Your phone is now running normally.

Your phone may get too hot if you:
 • Use resource-intensive apps (such as gaming, video or navigation apps)
 • Download or upload large files
 • Use your phone in high temperatures"

"Your device was too hot, so it turned off to cool down. Your device is now running normally.

Your device may get too hot if you:
 • Use resource-intensive apps (such as gaming, video or navigation apps)
 • Download or upload large files
 • Use your device in high temperatures"

"Your tablet was too hot, so it turned off to cool down. Your tablet is now running normally.

Your tablet may get too hot if you:
 • Use resource-intensive apps (such as gaming, video or navigation apps)
 • Download or upload large files
 • Use your tablet in high temperatures"
"Phone is getting warm"
"Device is getting warm"
"Tablet is getting warm"
"Some features limited while phone cools down.\nTap for more info"
"Some features limited while device cools down.\nTap for more info"
"Some features limited while tablet cools down.\nTap for more info"
"Your phone will automatically try to cool down. You can still use your phone, but it may run more slowly.\n\nOnce your phone has cooled down, it will run normally."
"Your device will automatically try to cool down. You can still use your device, but it may run slower.\n\nOnce your device has cooled down, it will run normally."
"Your tablet will automatically try to cool down. You can still use your tablet, but it may run slower.\n\nOnce your tablet has cooled down, it will run normally."
"The fingerprint sensor is on the power button. It’s the flat button next to the raised volume button on the edge of the tablet."
"The fingerprint sensor is on the power button. It’s the flat button next to the raised volume button on the edge of the device."
"The fingerprint sensor is on the power button. It’s the flat button next to the raised volume button on the edge of the phone."
"Unlock your phone for more options"
"Unlock your tablet for more options"
"Unlock your device for more options"
"Playing on this phone"
"Playing on this tablet"
"You can locate this phone with Find My Device even when powered off"
"You can locate this tablet with Find My Device even when powered off"
"You can locate this phone with Find Hub even when powered off"
"You can locate this tablet with Find Hub even when powered off"
"Show a clock, photos or weather when your phone is charging"
"Show a clock, photos or weather when your tablet is charging"
"Show a clock, photos or weather when your device is charging"
"Try Face Unlock again"
"Try unlocking with face again"
"Set up Face Unlock again"
"Set up unlocking with face again"
"Unlocked by face"
"Unlocked with face"
"Unlocked by face. Press to continue."
"Unlocked with face. Press to continue."
"Unlocked by face. Tap to continue."
"Unlocked with face. Tap to continue."
"Face Unlock"
"Unlocking with face"
"Set up Face Unlock"
"Set up unlocking with face"
"To set up Face Unlock again, your current face model will be deleted.\n\nYou\'ll need to set up this feature again to use your face to unlock your phone."
"To set up unlocking with face again, your current face model will be deleted.\n\nYou\'ll need to set up this feature again to use your face to unlock your device."
"Couldn\'t set up Face Unlock. Go to Settings to try again."
"Couldn\'t set up unlocking with face. Try again in Settings."
"Face Unlock unavailable"
"Unlocking with face unavailable"
"Swipe up to try Face Unlock again"
"Swipe up to try unlocking with face again"
"Unlocked by face. Swipe up to open."
"Unlocked with face. Swipe up to open."
"Unlocked by face. Press confirm to continue."
"Unlocked with face. Press confirm to continue."
"Unlocked by face. Press the unlock icon to open."
"Unlocked with face. Press the unlock icon to open."
"Unlocked by face. Press to open."
"Unlocked with face. Press to open."
"Unlocked by face"
"Unlocked with face"
